description: RentCafe is Yardi’s rental housing and property marketing platform used by property managers and renters for listings, leasing and resident services. The public rentcafe.com site primarily serves consumer-facing property and resident portal pages.
summary: rentcafe.com exposes evidence of a RentCafe API program, but no public developer docs, endpoint URL, machine-readable spec, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI on rentcafe.com were found.
